nodes.label: AGENT_WORKFLOW.md — Orchestration modes and handoff protocol
nodes.norm_label: agent_workflow.md — orchestration modes and handoff protocol

nodes.label: Mode A — Solo Claude Code (recommended for ASAP)
nodes.norm_label: mode a — solo claude code (recommended for asap)

nodes.label: Mode B — Builder + Reviewer pair (quality gate)
nodes.norm_label: mode b — builder + reviewer pair (quality gate)

nodes.label: Mode C — Team of agents (Hermes-orchestrated or parallel Claude Code + git worktrees)
nodes.norm_label: mode c — team of agents (hermes-orchestrated or parallel claude code + git worktrees)

nodes.label: Roles and path ownership (one writer per path — hard rule)
nodes.norm_label: roles and path ownership (one writer per path — hard rule)

nodes.label: Phase 0 — Foundation (paste into Claude Code plan mode, or Codex, from repo root)
nodes.norm_label: phase 0 — foundation (paste into claude code plan mode, or codex, from repo root)

nodes.label: Prerequisite: this kit's files are committed in a fresh git repo.
nodes.norm_label: prerequisite: this kit's files are committed in a fresh git repo.

nodes.label: Phase 1 — RAG/LLM service (paste into Claude Code plan mode, or Codex)
nodes.norm_label: phase 1 — rag/llm service (paste into claude code plan mode, or codex)

nodes.label: Phase 2 — Intake & auto-answer, WF-1 + WF-2 (paste into Claude Code or Codex)
nodes.norm_label: phase 2 — intake & auto-answer, wf-1 + wf-2 (paste into claude code or codex)

nodes.label: Prerequisite: Phase 1 accepted AND human completed P2-1 (bot token + ops chat ID in .env).
nodes.norm_label: prerequisite: phase 1 accepted and human completed p2-1 (bot token + ops chat id in .env).

nodes.label: Human afterwards: configure the two Telegram credentials in the n8n UI, run TESTPLAN M1, record backup video (P2-5).
nodes.norm_label: human afterwards: configure the two telegram credentials in the n8n ui, run testplan m1, record backup video (p2-5).

nodes.label: Phase 3 — Human-in-the-loop & SLA, WF-3 + WF-4 (paste into Claude Code or Codex)
nodes.norm_label: phase 3 — human-in-the-loop & sla, wf-3 + wf-4 (paste into claude code or codex)

nodes.label: Prerequisite: Phase 2 accepted; human has verified M1.
nodes.norm_label: prerequisite: phase 2 accepted; human has verified m1.

nodes.label: Phase 4 — Daily digest & Notion, WF-5 (paste into Claude Code or Codex)
nodes.norm_label: phase 4 — daily digest & notion, wf-5 (paste into claude code or codex)

nodes.label: Phase 5 — Evals & CI (paste into Claude Code or Codex; can run in parallel with P3/P4 in Mode C)
nodes.norm_label: phase 5 — evals & ci (paste into claude code or codex; can run in parallel with p3/p4 in mode c)

nodes.label: Phase 6 — Deploy & packaging (Claude Code, with the human alongside for cloud credentials)
nodes.norm_label: phase 6 — deploy & packaging (claude code, with the human alongside for cloud credentials)

nodes.label: Prerequisite: Phases 0–5 accepted; human E2E M1–M6 all passed.
nodes.norm_label: prerequisite: phases 0–5 accepted; human e2e m1–m6 all passed.

nodes.label: Human afterwards: record the 3-minute video (script in the application plan), paste metrics into README, publish the repo, apply.
nodes.norm_label: human afterwards: record the 3-minute video (script in the application plan), paste metrics into readme, publish the repo, apply.

nodes.label: R1 — Reviewer prompt (run in a FRESH Claude Code session or Codex — never the builder's session)
nodes.norm_label: r1 — reviewer prompt (run in a fresh claude code session or codex — never the builder's session)

nodes.label: Use after P1, P3, and P5 (Mode B), or continuously as the QA role (Mode C).
nodes.norm_label: use after p1, p3, and p5 (mode b), or continuously as the qa role (mode c).

nodes.label: R2 — Session resume prompt (paste to continue work after any interruption, in any agent)
nodes.norm_label: r2 — session resume prompt (paste to continue work after any interruption, in any agent)

nodes.label: R3 — Wiki lint prompt (run after each phase, and always before publishing the repo)
nodes.norm_label: r3 — wiki lint prompt (run after each phase, and always before publishing the repo)

nodes.label: Any agent; a fresh session is preferable. This is the maintenance pass that makes wiki/map.md trustworthy.
nodes.norm_label: any agent; a fresh session is preferable. this is the maintenance pass that makes wiki/map.md trustworthy.
